con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="LegacyService" targetNamespace="http://legacy.garage474.dev.br:8080/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://legacy.garage474.dev.br:8080/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ns1="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="unqualified" targetNamespace="http://legacy.garage474.dev.br:8080/" version="1.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="listUsers" type="tns:listUsers"/> <xs:element name="listUsersResponse" type="tns:listUsersResponse"/> <xs:element name="user" type="tns:userDTO"/> <xs:complexType name="listUsers"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="page" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="perPage" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="listUsersResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:userListResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="userListResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="page" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="perPage" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="total" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="userDTO"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="name" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="email" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cpf" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="birthDate" type="tns:localDate"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="phone" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="createdAt" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="updatedAt" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="active" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType final="extension restriction" name="localDate"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="listUsersResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:listUsersResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="listUsers"> <wsdl:part element="tns:listUsers" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="LegacyService"> <wsdl:operation name="listUsers"> <wsdl:input message="tns:listUsers" name="listUsers"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:listUsersResponse" name="listUsersResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="LegacyServiceSoapBinding" type="tns:LegacyService"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="listUsers"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="listUsers"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="listUsersResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="LegacyService"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:LegacyServiceSoapBinding" name="LegacyServicePort"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:8080/legacy-soap-app/LegacyService/LegacyService"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
